top_signals.title: Indian State Objects to MSC’s $1.4 Billion Deal With Adani Ports
top_signals.summary: An Indian state is objecting to Mediterranean Shipping Co.’s planned $1.4 billion investment in an Adani Group-run terminal, intensifying scrutiny of the Swiss firm after a chemical spill last year involving one of its vessels.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: LVMH Wins Court Case Over Logo Used by China Tea Chain
top_signals.summary: A Chinese milk tea brand has been ordered to pay $1.5 billion to French luxury giant Louis Vuitton for trademark infringement. The case has sparked widespread discussion on Chinese social media about intellectual property protection. Bloomberg's China correspondent Minmin Low reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: XRP bulls test path back toward $1.10 as token zips 4% higher
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ICICI Bank Mulls First Benchmark Dollar Bond Sale Since 2017
top_signals.summary: ICICI Bank Ltd., India’s second-largest private-sector lender, is in talks to raise at least $500 million in offshore bonds as it seeks to capitalize on a recent Reserve Bank of India concession for overseas borrowings, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Newcore Gold hits above-reserve grade at Nyam deposit
top_signals.summary: New results were highlighted by an intercept of 3.51 g/t gold over 21 metres from 245 metres down.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Is Bitcoin heading for $65K? Sharplink buys $16M ETH: Market Moves
top_signals.summary: Analysts are divided on Bitcoin's next move, but there's some hope at last. Meanwhile, SharpLink has resumed buying Ether after an eight-week pause, and other market news.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
